overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through Night City's Japantown district. The player moves from a dark steamy underpass into bright neon-lit commercial streets, passing under elevated highways and through a traditional Japanese gate into a shadowy alley filled with vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved concrete path beneath an overpass, with steam rising from vents on the left

entered.detail: steam rising from ground vents along the left side of the walkway
metal guardrail along the left edge of the curved walkway
tall utility pole with electrical transformers and hanging wires
large colorful billboard featuring anime-style character artwork
purple neon signage on the distant building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, steamy urban underpass with concrete walkways curving to the right. Steam rises from floor vents on the left, while a large anime billboard is visible ahead. The environment is enclosed with no sky visible, creating a moody, low-light atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street transitioning from underpass to open commercial area

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into brighter outdoor daylight
red vintage sedan car passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk as the environment opens up to daylight and urban traffic

notable_agents.action: red vintage sedan driving along the curved road from ahead to behind

entered.detail: large circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on building facade
pink neon hotel sign becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass into bright daylight, revealing a curved street with industrial buildings. A red vintage car passes by on the right as the camera continues along the sidewalk. The pink neon hotel sign becomes visible in the distance, marking the transition to the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial district with elevated highways

events.description: entering the main commercial plaza with dense neon signage and multi-level buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk through the commercial district, passing other pedestrians and observing the dense urban architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tank top and jeans walking toward the camera
person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
tightly packed buildings covered in neon signs and advertisements
modern street lamp post with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright, bustling commercial district with dense cyberpunk architecture. The elevated highway looms ahead while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk. The pink hotel sign draws closer on the right, and the street is lined with parked vehicles and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching traditional Japanese gate

events.description: slight turn to the right as the path curves toward the traditional gate structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through pedestrians while approaching the traditional Japanese gate with red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: traditional wooden gate structure with tiled roof and red paper lanterns
red Japanese paper lanterns hanging from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the commercial street toward a distinctive traditional Japanese gate that marks the entrance to a different district. Red paper lanterns hang from the gate structure, contrasting with the modern cyberpunk buildings surrounding it. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and narrow alley with vending machines

events.description: passing under the traditional Japanese gate into a darker covered alleyway
entering a dimly lit alley illuminated primarily by neon vending machine lights

agents.ego_description: walking under the traditional gate and into the shadowy alleyway lined with glowing vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in yellow safety vest walking ahead in the narrow alley

entered.detail: green and red vending machine advertising burritos with bright neon lighting
blue vending machine with cola branding and illuminated display
tight concrete walls of the narrow passage creating an enclosed feeling
circular blue neon sign hanging above the alleyway

segments.scene_description: Passing under the traditional Japanese gate, the environment shifts dramatically to a dark, narrow alleyway illuminated by neon vending machines. The burrito and cola vending machines glow brightly against the shadowy walls, while a circular blue neon sign hangs in the distance. The space feels enclosed and intimate compared to the open streets before.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, enclosed urban underpass into the bright, neon-saturated bustle of a commercial district. It begins in a dark, steamy concrete corridor where vapor rises from floor vents and a large anime billboard looms ahead. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into bright daylight, revealing a curved street with industrial buildings and a red vintage car passing by. The scene then expands into a dense cyberpunk cityscape, where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon as the camera approaches a glowing pink hotel sign. Finally, the view opens further to reveal pedestrians and parked vehicles beneath the heavy shadow of a looming elevated highway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling commercial street into the secluded depths of a neon-lit alleyway. It begins by moving along a crowded sidewalk past modern cyberpunk buildings toward a traditional Japanese gate adorned with red paper lanterns. As the camera passes under the gate, the open urban environment shifts dramatically into a dark, narrow corridor. The scene then transitions from the bright daylight of the street to a shadowy space illuminated by the vivid glow of burrito and cola vending machines. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the enclosed alley, moving toward a circular blue neon sign hanging in the distance.
